name: Ndonga
notes: STUB: the grapheme inventory of Ndonga is NOT yet specified (graphemes/allophones are empty). Ndonga (Oshindonga) is a Bantu (Atlantic-Congo) language of Namibia and Angola, one of the two standardised Ovambo varieties (with Kwanyama), written in the Latin script.
